name: AMERICAN SHARED HOSPITAL SERVICES
summary: American Shared Hospital Services (AMS) provides shared-service and turnkey solutions for advanced radiosurgery and radiation therapy equipment to hospitals and medical facilities. The company has a significant investment in proton beam radiation therapy business and offers capital-intensive medical equipment services. AMS operates under shared-service models, enabling healthcare providers to access high-cost treatment technology.

products.name: Radiosurgery Services
products.description: Shared-service radiosurgery equipment and solutions provided to hospitals and medical facilities.

products.name: Proton Beam Radiation Therapy
products.description: Proton beam radiation therapy services and equipment investments for cancer treatment at medical facilities.

products.name: Radiation Therapy Services
products.description: Turnkey radiation therapy equipment and services offered to healthcare providers on a shared-service basis.
